generated_exposure.exposure_text: New report reveals how foreign adversaries are exploiting gaps in our civil defense systems. Experts warn that without immediate preparedness investments, we're leaving communities vulnerable to emerging threats. The current approach isn't just inadequate—it's putting lives at risk. We can't afford to wait while critical infrastructure remains exposed. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
